episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 482: Pro Tour Final Fantasy Promos
episode.description: The guys discuss the outcomes from the Final Fantasy Pro Tour, the hottest cardboard of the week and how crazy the prices are on the promo cards handed out at the event.
